# Node modules (Never push these!)
node_modules/
frontend/node_modules/

# Hardhat compiled files and cache
artifacts/
cache/
typechain-types/
typechain/
coverage/
coverage.json

# React / Vite build files
frontend/dist/
frontend/build/
.eslintcache

# Environment variables (Keep secrets safe!)
.env
.env.local

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
